symptom: A2-Tool LoRA (training/launch_alm_a2_tool.hexa, 1500 steps, final loss=0.049) regressed on hire_sim_lenient: avg_score=0.5667, completion_rate=0.4333, verdict=BLOCKED_<0.60.

root_cause_confirmed.mechanism: 30 repetitions of each of 50 synthetic tool templates at lr=3e-6 overfit the attention heads to template patterns. r9's broad instruction-following prior was overwritten for non-tool domains (schedule numeric rule 0/5 is the smoking gun — no schedule examples in tool corpus, but attention was re-weighted anyway).
root_cause_confirmed.config_assumption_violation: Config assumed tool_use_gate 0.933 on r9 meant 'consolidation-only' — but LoRA on attention-only with r32 is NOT low-impact when the corpus is 50 examples × 1500 steps (effective rehearsal count dominated by narrow distribution).

hypotheses_ruled_out: NOT a data format issue (same jsonl format as A1/A2-Orch)
NOT an LR crash (final loss 0.049 smooth descent)
NOT a merge artifact (A1→A2-Orch merge worked per convergence chain)
decision: HALT deploy A2-Tool ckpt to 13B/70B. Pivot next wave to r9 base + pathc-style prompt prefix as the blessed recipe. A2-Tool ckpt kept in R2 for ablation, NOT for serving.
next_actions: convergence 상태 failed 로 변경 (shared/convergence/alm_14b_a2_tool.convergence) — DONE
A2-Orch 단독 ckpt를 r9 대체 후보로 eval (이미 pod에 step_3000 존재)
14B 프로덕션: r9 + pathc client-side prefix 유지 (0.9444 PASS 재확인됨)
70B SFT corpus 설계 시 tool corpus 50예시 비중은 <1% 제한 + 일반 지시 코퍼스 ≥40M으로 희석
A3 recovery option(향후): tool corpus 500+ 다양화 OR steps 300 이하 OR lr 1e-7 검토

impact_on_70b.direct_weight_impact: NONE — 70B는 fresh Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct에서 새 LoRA, A2-Tool weights 미상속 (launch_ready lineage.json metadata-only)
impact_on_70b.indirect_corpus_impact: HIGH — 70B SFT가 동일 tool corpus를 많이 넣으면 동일 회귀 발생 가능. corpus 설계 반영 필요
impact_on_70b.recommended_change: shared/state/alm_70b_launch_ready_20260417.json D6에 '50-example tool corpus <1% 비중' 조건 추가
